narrative.intro: Distillation is alchemy's signature operation — the technique that travelled furthest and changed most hands. From late-antique Egypt through the Arabic laboratories to the Latin West, the still is the thread the whole tradition hangs on.
narrative.provenance_note: Theme = events tagged 'distillation' (237 in corpus). Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Modern Atlas: the toolkit's cleanest register for its most technical theme — distillation as apparatus and procedure, read like a lab chart.
